import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F
import math

class GaussianRBF(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, n_rbf, start=0.0, cutoff=5.0):
        super().__init__()
        self.n_rbf = n_rbf
        self.cutoff = cutoff
        self.centers = nn.Parameter(torch.linspace(start, cutoff, n_rbf), requires_grad=False)
        self.gamma = nn.Parameter(torch.full((n_rbf,), 0.5 / ((cutoff / n_rbf) ** 2)), requires_grad=False)

    def forward(self, dists):
        radial = dists.unsqueeze(-1) - self.centers.view(1, 1, 1, -1)
        return torch.exp(-self.gamma * radial.pow(2))

class InteractionBlock(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, hidden_dim, n_rbf):
        super().__init__()
        self.mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim + n_rbf, hidden_dim),
            nn.SiLU(),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),
        )
        self.ln = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)

    def forward(self, x, edge_rbf, mask):
        B, N, h = x.shape
        x_i = x.unsqueeze(2).expand(-1, -1, N, -1)
        x_j = x.unsqueeze(1).expand(-1, N, -1, -1)
        edge_feat = torch.cat([x_j, edge_rbf], dim=-1)
        messages = self.mlp(edge_feat)
        mask_2d = mask.squeeze(-1).unsqueeze(-1) * mask.squeeze(-1).unsqueeze(1)
        messages = messages * mask_2d.unsqueeze(-1)
        agg = messages.sum(dim=2)
        x = x + agg
        x = self.ln(x)
        return x

class SchNetLikeModel(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_atoms_max=30, hidden_dim=128, n_rbf=20, num_layers=3, max_z=10):
        super().__init__()
        self.max_atoms = num_atoms_max
        self.embedding = nn.Embedding(max_z+1, hidden_dim)
        self.rbf = GaussianRBF(n_rbf)
        self.layers = nn.ModuleList([
            InteractionBlock(hidden_dim, n_rbf) for _ in range(num_layers)
        ])
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(0.1)
        self.output_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.SiLU(),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.SiLU(),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim // 2, 1)
        )

    def forward(self, z, pos, mask):
        B, N = z.shape
        diff = pos.unsqueeze(2) - pos.unsqueeze(1)
        dist = torch.norm(diff, dim=-1)
        edge_rbf = self.rbf(dist)
        x = self.embedding(z)
        for layer in self.layers:
            x = layer(x, edge_rbf, mask)
        x = x * mask
        x_sum = x.sum(dim=1)
        x_sum = self.dropout(x_sum)
        out = self.output_mlp(x_sum).squeeze(-1)
        return out
